subject: You have mentorship requests waiting for you
html:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

You have {{pending_count}} mentorship request(s) still waiting for a response:

{{requests_list}}

Please get in touch with these mentees, or decline the requests if you can't take them right now — either way, they'll know where they stand. You can do both from your dashboard:

Open your dashboard

Heads up: if a request stays pending for more than 30 days, we'll temporarily deactivate your profile and hide it from the catalog. You can reactivate it any time from your dashboard.

Thanks for mentoring!
The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

You have {{pending_count}} mentorship request(s) still waiting for a response:

{{requests_list_text}}

Please get in touch with these mentees, or decline the requests if you can't take them right now — either way, they'll know where they stand. You can do both from your dashboard:

https://openmentor.io/mentor

Heads up: if a request stays pending for more than 30 days, we'll temporarily deactivate your profile and hide it from the catalog. You can reactivate it any time from your dashboard.

Thanks for mentoring!
The OpenMentor Team
